tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating prediabetes or early diabetes, and a slightly high chloride level, which may be clinically insignificant if asymptomatic. Renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are within normal limits. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend monitoring glycemic control and considering lifestyle or therapeutic interventions as appropriate.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
